name: sci_fi
description: Science fiction — stations, ships, alien worlds
setting_pool: A space station corridor under artificial light
A colonial outpost on a barren planet
A cargo bay aboard a deep-space freighter
A derelict station drifting in orbit

background_pool.text: The interior of {setting}, curved bulkheads of brushed titanium alloy, recessed lighting strips along the floor and ceiling, observation windows showing starfield black, the hum of recyclers and air scrubbers
The command space of {setting}, sweeping console arrays arranged in concentric tiers, holographic displays casting blue-white light, viewport screens showing tactical overlays and navigation data
The exposed terrain around {setting}, ochre and rust-colored rock formations sculpted by wind, a thin dust haze filtering harsh sunlight, an alien sky shading from amber to indigo at the horizon

The cavernous freight hold of {setting}, stacked shipping containers stamped with faded corporate logos, overhead gantries and loading arms, emergency lighting strips casting hard shadows across metal decking

The decaying corridors of {setting}, emergency lighting casting dim red pulses across frost-covered surfaces, dead display panels flickering intermittently, cables and conduit hanging loose from ruptured panels

A maintenance crawlspace within {setting}, exposed conduit and junction boxes, the hum of power systems behind thin panels, emergency handles and override switches within arm's reach, the confined geometry of service infrastructure
An airlock vestibule at {setting}, heavy bulkhead doors with manual override levers, warning stripes and indicator lights cycling from red to green, the sterile chrome of a pressurized threshold
The medical bay of {setting}, smooth white surfaces and recessed instrument panels, a surgical light cluster, the quiet pulse of diagnostic monitors displaying vital readings

The reactor core chamber of {setting}, a column of contained plasma casting blue-white light across shielding baffles, the low vibration of power generation felt through the deck plates, warning markings on the floor
The exterior landing apron beside {setting}, hard-packed regolith and blast-scorched metal planking, a service vehicle parked with its cargo ramp down, the horizon a sharp line under an alien sky

subject_pool: an engineer in a zero-g maintenance suit
a colonial marine in battered powered armor
a ship's officer in a fitted uniform
a scientist in a environment-suited hazard rig
a pilot with a flight helmet under one arm
a deck worker in a high-vis vest and mag-boots
a rogue android with exposed circuitry
a surveyor with a scanner and sample case
a cybernetic marine in battle-scarred exo-armor
a xenobiologist with a sampling kit and headlamp
a ship engineer with a welding torch and grease-stained coveralls
a corporate agent in a pristine grey suit
action_pool: running a diagnostic on a flickering console
snapping a fresh magazine into a rifle
studying a holographic readout with furrowed brow
welding a hull plate, sparks cascading
suiting up at an airlock prep station
staring out a viewport at something vast
patching a hull breach with emergency sealant
scanning the corridor with a handheld sensor
patching a conduit with spray-foam sealant
speaking quietly into a wrist communicator
